title: V8 Engine Model Kit That Runs, Visible Mini Car Motor Building Set for Adults & Teens, Compatible with Lego, STEM Physical Science Educational Toy for Boys 14+ (905 PCS)
features: 【Classic V8 Engine Model】This meticulously detailed model kit faithfully replicates a classic 8-cylinder car engine. It features moving pistons, a functional valve train, a turbocharger, and an exhaust system, dynamically demonstrating the complex inner workings and fundamental principles of a real internal combustion engine. A must-have for mechanical enthusiasts and model collectors.

【Simulate Real Operation】Say goodbye to the battery! This V8 engine model is powered by a two-speed USB rechargeable motor. It simulates the real engine functions, allowing you to watch the roar of the engine fan rotating and the rhythmic movement mechanism of the pistons, providing any car enthusiast or collector with a more environmentally friendly and relaxed immersive experience.

【High-Quality Durable Kit】This V8 engine model kit is meticulously crafted from high-quality materials and consists of 905 pieces. These kits are seamlessly assembled together to achieve a satisfactory and beneficial building experience, ensuring that your carefully assembled model is both robust and durable, demonstrating the excellence of the car.

【 Excellent STEM Educational Toy 】 This V8 engine is an excellent educational toy for teenagers aged 8 and above. It enhances creativity, improves hands-on skills and develops problem-solving abilities through assembly and debugging. It is very suitable for STEM classrooms, technology clubs or as a challenging family project.

【Ultimate Gift for Car Enthusiasts】 Our V8 engine model is the ultimate gift for any occasion. Whether you are a die-hard car enthusiast, a model lover, or someone who appreciates exquisite craftsmanship, this V8 engine kit is a must-have conversation starter that showcases your passion for mechanical engineering.
